intro: Master the neon streets and prove your skill against the fastest legends.
description:
Step into the underground world of Osaka’s legendary highway racers in Kanjozoku Game: Car Racing & Highway Driving Simulator REMASTER. Inspired by the iconic 90s street scene, this remastered experience puts you behind the wheel of authentic JDM machines, where speed, precision, and reputation define everything.

Take over the Kanjo loop at night, weave through dense traffic, and prove your dominance in high-speed battles. Every run is a test of skill—push your limits, outdrive your rivals, and rise through the underground ranks to become the most feared racer on the highway.

Build your ultimate car with deep and detailed customization. From performance tuning to visual styling, every upgrade shapes how your machine handles and how it stands out on the streets.

Key Features:
 ● Authentic 90s Osaka highway racing atmosphere with intense night driving and traffic challenges
 ● Wide selection of classic JDM cars with full tuning options: engine upgrades, swaps, suspension, and performance setups
 ● Extensive customization system including body parts, wheels, stance tuning, and custom liveries
 ● Multiple gameplay modes and activities: time-based challenges, traffic dodging, drifting, and competitive racing
 ● Dynamic world with car meets, hotspots, and high-speed police chases
 ● Progression system that rewards skillful driving, risk-taking, and race performance

Push beyond limits, own the highway, and become a true Kanjo legend.
